body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-9739", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-942", "name": "Permissive Cross-domain Security Policy with Untrusted Domains"}], "description": "Vulnerable to DNS rebinding attacks when using SSE (http://b/499408790). During the beta phase, we implemented `allowed-origins` and `allowed-hosts` flags to align with MCP security guidelines. However, the hardcoded `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` header in the SSE initialization handler was inadvertently retained. This vulnerability specifically impacts users connecting via Toolbox using SSE under specification v2024-11-05.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00279, "percentile": 0.19527}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7pf3-8xx7-rvhf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T20:54:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7pf3-8xx7-rvhf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7pf3-8xx7-rvhf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9739"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-27T23:16:48Z", "published_at": "2026-05-28T00:30:29Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9739", "https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox/issues/3053", "https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox/pull/3054", "https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox/commit/c4c7bd917e686de68e2be866cfe3872c3439efae", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7pf3-8xx7-rvhf"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox", "summary": "MCP Toolbox for Databases vulnerable to DNS rebinding attacks", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T20:54:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7pf3-8xx7-rvhf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
